    testContainsInappropriateContent_CleanText() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Clean text should not be flagged.
    testContainsInappropriateContent_EmptyString() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Empty string should not be flagged.
    testContainsInappropriateContent_InappropriateWord() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Text containing an inappropriate word should be flagged.
    testContainsInappropriateContent_MixedCase() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Mixed case inappropriate word should still be flagged.
    testContainsInappropriateContent_Null() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Null input should not be flagged.
    testContainsInappropriateContent_SubstringNotFlagged() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    A word that merely contains an inappropriate substring should NOT be flagged.

    testValidateEmailMessage_Empty() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Empty string input should return a validation error.
    testValidateEmailMessage_Null() - Method in class testing.StaffFeedbackValidatorTest
    Null input should return a validation error.

    A valid message should pass validation and return an empty string.
